description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a wide, overhanging eave. The exterior is finished in light-colored walls with dark trim, and the roof is a medium gray, likely made of metal or shingles. Large windows are present on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A covered porch extends across the front, supported by simple columns, offering a sheltered entryway. The building sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with minimal decorative elements and a clean, modern appearance. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, light walls, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a green lawn. The design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, large front windows, and the main entrance beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, smaller windows, and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_2: Direct front-on view emphasizing the symmetry of the porch, entryway, and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the long side elevation, multiple windows, and the depth of the roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
